messages:
{"parts":[{"tool_name":"read_file","content":["# Minimal SaaS Landing Page Template
# Clean, professional template based on Linear, Vercel, and Stripe patterns

---
# TEMPLATE METADATA

name: minimal-saas
description: |
  Clean, professional SaaS landing page. Works for B2B tools,
  developer products, and productivity apps. Emphasizes clarity
  and trust over flashiness. Ideal for established companies that
  want to communicate competence and reliability.

source: |
  Synthesized from Linear, Vercel, and Stripe landing page patterns.
  Captures the "grown-up startup" aesthetic with restrained color usage
  and emphasis on typography hierarchy.

created: 2026-02-06

---
# COLOR PALETTE

palette:
  primary: "#0A0A0A"      # Near-black - primary text, key elements
  secondary: "#525252"    # Medium gray - secondary text, borders
  accent: "#2563EB"       # Professional blue - CTAs, links, highlights
  background: "#FFFFFF"   # Pure white - main page background
  surface: "#FAFAFA"      # Off-white - card backgrounds, sections
  text: "#0A0A0A"         # Near-black - high contrast body text
  text_muted: "#737373"   # Gray - secondary text, captions

---
# TYPOGRAPHY

typography:
  heading_font: "Inter"
  body_font: "Inter"
  scale: normal
  heading_weight: 600

---
# LAYOUT SETTINGS

layout:
  max_width: standard
  spacing: balanced
  border_radius: subtle

---
# PAGE SECTIONS

sections:
  - type: hero
    variant: centered
  
  - type: logos
    variant: simple
  
  - type: features
    variant: grid-3col
  
  - type: testimonials
    variant: single
  
  - type: cta
    variant: centered

---
# STYLE NOTES

style_notes: |
  Minimal, sophisticated aesthetic that relies on typography and spacing
  rather than color or ornamental elements. Key characteristics:
  
  - Typography-driven design with excellent hierarchy
  - Subtle shadows only (shadow-sm, shadow-md max)
  - No gradients — solid colors throughout
  - Generous whitespace between sections
  - Icons from Lucide with stroke-width 1.5
  - Button style: solid fill with subtle hover states
  - Links: underline on hover, not color changes
  - Overall density: spacious but not wastefully empty
  - Content arrangement: centered layouts with clear focal points
  - Border treatment: subtle rounded corners (4px)
  - Animation: minimal, smooth transitions only
  
  The aesthetic conveys: "We are serious about our product and 
  our customers. We don't need flashy design to prove our worth."
  
  Think Linear's clarity, Vercel's technical confidence, and 
  Stripe's business maturity rolled into one template.",{"kind":"file_ref","path":"/home/workspace/Skills/frontend/templates/minimal-saas.yaml","media_type":null,"label":null}],"tool_call_id":"toolu_01UPT2H6dc4qec3gSqr1eWJT","metadata":null,"timestamp":"2026-02-06T21:22:37.449809Z","part_kind":"tool-return"}],"timestamp":null,"instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":null,"metadata":null}
